title: Top Undervalued Small Caps With Insider Buying In April 2026
content:
The United States market has shown a positive trend, increasing by 1.2% over the last week and climbing 33% in the past year, with earnings projected to grow by 16% annually in the coming years. In this environment, identifying stocks that are potentially undervalued while also exhibiting insider buying can be an effective strategy for investors seeking opportunities within small-cap companies.

Top 10 Undervalued Small Caps With Insider Buying In The United States

Click here to see the full list of 56 stocks from our Undervalued US Small Caps With Insider Buying screener.

Below we spotlight a couple of our favorites from our exclusive screener.

Advantage Solutions

Simply Wall St Value Rating: ★★★☆☆☆

Overview: Advantage Solutions is a company that provides a range of services including branded services, retailer services, and experiential services with a market capitalization of approximately $1.35 billion.

Operations: The company generates revenue primarily from Branded Services, Retailer Services, and Experiential Services. Over recent periods, its gross profit margin has shown fluctuations, with a notable decrease to 12.44% as of December 2024. Operating expenses have consistently been a significant portion of the cost structure, impacting overall profitability.

PE: -1.4x

Advantage Solutions, a company facing challenges such as non-compliance with Nasdaq's minimum bid price and high volatility, is navigating its financial landscape with strategic moves. Despite reporting a net loss of US$161.73 million for Q4 2025, the firm shows insider confidence through David Peacock's purchase of 8,000 shares valued at US$128,780 in March 2026. The company anticipates flat to low single-digit revenue growth for 2026 while restructuring its debt and leadership team to enhance operational efficiency.

Delve into the full analysis valuation report here for a deeper understanding of Advantage Solutions. Examine Advantage Solutions' past performance report to understand how it has performed in the past.ADV Ownership Breakdown as at Apr 2026

American Assets Trust

Simply Wall St Value Rating: ★★★☆☆☆

Overview: American Assets Trust operates as a real estate investment trust focusing on office, retail, mixed-use, and multifamily properties with a market capitalization of approximately $1.36 billion.

Story Continues

Operations: The company's primary revenue streams are from its office, retail, mixed-use, and multifamily segments. Over recent periods, the net profit margin has shown variability with a notable peak of 17.74% in Q1 2025 before declining to 12.89% by Q4 2025. The cost of goods sold (COGS) consistently impacts gross profit margins, which have also experienced fluctuations over time. Operating expenses remain significant due to depreciation and amortization costs alongside general and administrative expenses.

PE: 20.9x

American Assets Trust, a smaller player in the real estate sector, recently increased its revolving credit line to US$500 million, extending maturity to 2030. Despite a drop in net income to US$3.15 million for Q4 2025 from US$8.98 million the previous year, insider confidence is evident with Ernest Rady purchasing shares worth over US$3 million. However, earnings are projected to decline by nearly 30% annually over the next three years due to reliance on external borrowing and large one-off items affecting results.

Get an in-depth perspective on American Assets Trust's performance by reading our valuation report here. Evaluate American Assets Trust's historical performance by accessing our past performance report.AAT Share price vs Value as at Apr 2026

Third Coast Bancshares

Simply Wall St Value Rating: ★★★★☆☆

Overview: Third Coast Bancshares operates as a community banking institution, primarily focusing on providing financial services and products, with a market capitalization of approximately $0.22 billion.

Operations: The company generates revenue primarily from community banking, with the latest reported figure at $201.28 million. Operating expenses are significant, with general and administrative expenses constituting a large portion, reaching $101.10 million in the most recent period. The net income margin has shown an upward trend, reaching 30.57% as of the latest data point available.

PE: 10.5x

Third Coast Bancshares, with over $6 billion in assets, has seen significant insider confidence through share purchases. Their recent merger with Keystone Bancshares bolstered their position as a leading independent Texas bank. Earnings showed strong growth, with net income rising to US$66 million for 2025. Despite no share repurchases recently, the company's strategic expansion in Houston under new leadership indicates a focus on middle-market banking and industry-specific growth opportunities.

title: Monday Sector Leaders: Hospital & Medical Practitioners, Advertising Stocks
content:
In trading on Monday, hospital & medical practitioners shares were relative leaders, up on the day by about 2.5%.  Leading the group were shares of Agilon Health, up about 24.6% and shares of Clover Health Investments up about 11.3% on the day.

Also showing relative strength are advertising shares, up on the day by about 2.5% as a group, led by Advantage Solutions, trading up by about 9.7% and National CineMedia, trading up by about 6.5% on Monday.

title: How The Narrative On Advanced Enzyme Technologies (NSEI:ADVENZYMES) Is Shifting Around The ₹370 Fair Value
content:
Find your next quality investment with Simply Wall St's easy and powerful screener, trusted by over 7 million individual investors worldwide.

The fair value estimate for Advanced Enzyme Technologies is held at ₹370.0, so the latest model update does not shift the headline price target. Bullish and bearish analysts are reading this steady figure differently, with some seeing it as confirmation of a stable valuation anchor and others viewing it as a cap on near term upside. As you read on, you will see how to interpret these signals and track how the story changes with future updates.

Analyst Price Targets don't always capture the full story. Head over to our Company Report to find new ways to value Advanced Enzyme Technologies.

What Wall Street Has Been Saying

🐂 Bullish Takeaways

Where analysts see improving cash generation and cleaner business portfolios, as highlighted by Canaccord Genuity in its recent work on Advantage Solutions, the read across for a company like Advanced Enzyme Technologies is that balance sheet simplicity and consistent free cash flow can justify holding fair value estimates steady. The Canaccord update, which kept a Buy rating while revising the price target, shows that some firms can remain constructive on long term potential even when they fine tune their models, something investors can keep in mind when comparing Advanced Enzyme Technologies’ fair value of ₹370.0 with any future broker revisions.

🐻 Bearish Takeaways

Canaccord’s decision to lower a price target, even while acknowledging momentum in free cash flow for Advantage Solutions, is a reminder that research houses can still trim valuation when they see execution risks or a more cautious growth setup, which some investors may analogously apply when assessing the upside ceiling around ₹370.0 for Advanced Enzyme Technologies. The mix of a reduced target and an unchanged positive rating in the Canaccord report underlines that analysts can separate operational improvements from valuation headroom, a pattern that may encourage more conservative expectations for re rating potential if Advanced Enzyme Technologies’ fundamentals do not clearly outpace current assumptions.

Do your thoughts align with the Bull or Bear Analysts? Perhaps you think there's more to the story. Head to the Simply Wall St Community to discover more perspectives!NSEI:ADVENZYMES 1-Year Stock Price Chart

See how Advanced Enzyme Technologies' fair value stacks up across multiple valuation models — not just analyst targets.

What's in the News

Advanced Enzyme Technologies has scheduled a board meeting for January 31, 2026 to consider and approve its unaudited financial results for the quarter ended December 31, 2025. The same meeting will also review the unaudited financial results for the nine month period ended December 31, 2025. This will provide a more complete view of the company’s performance over the current financial year to date. No additional company specific periodical or news updates are currently available beyond the upcoming results related board meeting.

Story Continues

How This Changes the Fair Value For Advanced Enzyme Technologies

Fair value estimate remains at ₹370.0, with no change to the overall valuation anchor in the model. Revenue growth assumption is effectively stable at 16.14%, with only a very small numerical adjustment. Net profit margin input is steady at around 20.23%, with virtually no change from the prior level. Future P/E multiple has moved slightly from 26.32x to 26.26x, indicating a modestly lower multiple applied to future earnings. Discount rate has shifted from 12.97% to 12.88%, reflecting a marginally lower required return in the updated assumptions.

Never Miss an Update: Follow The Narrative

Narratives connect a company’s business story to the assumptions behind its forecast and fair value, so you can see what is driving the numbers. They refresh over time as new data, risks, and milestones are added.

Head over to the Simply Wall St Community and follow the Narrative on Advanced Enzyme Technologies to stay up to date on:

How expansion into health, wellness, and B2C nutrition and wellness products relates to the growth outlook. The role of R&D, biocatalysis, and international subsidiaries in supporting product differentiation and earnings stability. Key risks around tariffs, margin pressure, competition, and the pace of scaling new segments such as probiotics and specialized nutrition.
